name: Return to last library catalog
fullName: Catalog Navigation: Return to last library catalog

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "Palace Bookshelf" on Add library screen
Then  Account "Palace Bookshelf" is present on Accounts screen
And  Library 'LYRASIS Reads' is present on Catalog Screen
